/usr/bin/clang++ -nostartfiles -nostdlib  -fexceptions -fcxx-exceptions -D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS --target=x86_64-windows-msvc -fms-compatibility-version=19.37 -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -isystem /usr/bin/../lib/clang/22/include -isystem"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/crt/include" -isystem"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/ucrt" -isystem"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/shared" -isystem"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/um" -isystem"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/winrt" -ivfsoverlay"/home/d050/Coding/Me Coding/MultiplayerEdit/build-win/winsdk_vfs_overlay.yaml" -Wshorten-64-to-32 -O2 -DNDEBUG -g -Xclang -gcodeview -D_DLL -D_MT -Xclang --dependent-lib=msvcrt  -L"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/crt/lib/x86_64" -L"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/lib/ucrt/x86_64" -L"/home/d050/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/lib/um/x86_64" -L"/home/d050/Coding/Me Coding/MultiplayerEdit/build-win/winsdk_lib_symlinks" -Xlinker /subsystem:console -fuse-ld=lld-link @CMakeFiles/ws.dir/objects1.rsp -o ws.exe -Xlinker /MANIFEST:EMBED -Xlinker /implib:ws.lib -Xlinker /pdb:"/home/d050/Coding/Me Coding/MultiplayerEdit/build-win/_deps/ixwebsocket-build/ws/ws.pdb" -Xlinker /version:0.0  @CMakeFiles/ws.dir/linkLibs.rsp
